basicInfo.name: Karl Heron
basicInfo.flavor: Karl Heron's reputation for roaming the land and challenging the powerful opponents he came across earned him the moniker of the \"Double Spear Hunter.\" It was during this time that he crossed paths with Teo; after suffering defeat in a duel against him, he joined Teo's organization.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy (Prioritizes Targets w/ Thunderbolt Mark)
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - Deals additional 400 Fixed damage against targets inflicted with [Thunderbolt Mark].
 - 20% chance to inflict Shock against targets inflicted with [Thunderbolt Mark]. [Duration: 1 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 120% of Physical Attack.
Transcend Lv.2 Effect
 - Single Enemy (Thunderbolt Mark)
 - Increases Chance: Shock chance becomes 30%.

Skill 1.name: Lightning Beam
Skill 1.desc:
3 Enemies (Prioritizes Targets with Thunderbolt Mark)
 - Deals Piercing damage equal to 53% of Physical Attack 3 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Physical Vulnerability. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Deals additional 1700 Fixed, Piercing damage against targets inflicted with [Thunderbolt Mark].
 - 30% chance to inflict Shock against targets inflicted with [Thunderbolt Mark]. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Physical Vulnerability to 28%.
Transcend Lv.2 Effect
 - Single Enemy (Thunderbolt Mark)
 - Increases Chance: Shock chance becomes 50%.

Skill 2.name: Heavens' Wrath: Reformed
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 57% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
 - Each attack has a 30% chance to inflict Shock. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Deals additional 1700 Fixed damage against targets inflicted with [Thunderbolt Mark].
 - 30% chance to inflict Shock against targets inflicted with [Thunderbolt Mark]. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Chance: Shock chance becomes 35%.
Transcend Lv.2 Effect
 - Single Enemy (Thunderbolt Mark)
 - Increases Chance: Shock chance becomes 50%.

Passive.name: Master of the Twin Spears
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants All Damage Immunity. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Revives with 80% HP upon falling in battle. [Once per Battle]
 - Allies (Attack)
 - Grants Crit Damage Boost. [Always Active]
 - All Allies
 - Grants Physical Damage Boost. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Effect Resist Boost. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - All Enemies
 - Inflicts Incoming Healing Reduction. [Always Active]
 - Enemy with the Highest Attack
 - Starting battles with at least 3 Attack hero(es) on your team inflicts Thunderbolt Mark. [Always Active]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: HP gained upon revival becomes 100%.
 - Increases Effect: Incoming Healing Reduction to 52%.
Transcend Lv.6 Effect
 - Attack Allies
 - Adds Effect: Grants All Damage Nullification upon revival. [Ends After: Taking 2 Hit(s)] [1 Time(s) per Battle]
 - Adds Effect: 2 Debuff Removal(s) upon revival. [1 Time(s) per Battle]
 - Adds Effect: Grants 19% Physical Damage Boost upon revival. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)] [1 Time(s) per Battle]

transcendence.transcend_7: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_8: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_9: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_10: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_11: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_12: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.

profile.likes: Eileene, Aquila, Taka, cactus juice, neutrality, small furry animals, the color purple, the color blue
profile.dislikes: Bai Jiao, various dried foods, chaos, evil, awkward silences, the color black
profile.story: Karl Heron's reputation for roaming the land and challenging the powerful opponents he came across earned him the moniker of the \"Double Spear Hunter.\" It was during this time that he crossed paths with Teo; after suffering defeat in a duel against him, he joined Teo's organization.

basicInfo.name: Karl Heron
basicInfo.flavor: Having grown tired of mercenary life, Karl Heron left the group without a word. Afterward, he traveled the continent, seeking out and engaging in duels with the most formidable fighters across the continent.

profile.story: Having grown tired of mercenary life, Karl Heron left the group without a word. Afterward, he traveled the continent, seeking out and engaging in duels with the most formidable fighters across the continent.

basicInfo.name: Karl Heron
basicInfo.flavor: As the grandson of the former leader of the Daybreak Mercenaries, Karl Heron earned recognition for his combat prowess and went on to serve as the group's vice captain. He inherited his skill and technique with the spear from his grandfather, then went on to further refine it by incorporating his own style.
